case_title: MACK VENTURES, LLC VS. MARLON H. PARRISH

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACK VENTURES, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGELO ORCIUOL, MANAGING PARTNER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACK VENTURES, LLC
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT PARRISH, MARLON H.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED PER AGREEMENT.

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT THIS MATTER IS DISCHARGED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED. COPY FORWARDED TO ACCOUNTING DEPT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACK VENTURES, LLC
STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY MACK VENTURES, LLC PARRISH, MARLON H.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT PARRISH, MARLON H. HEARING SET FOR NOV-03-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO DEFENDANT PARRISH, MARLON H. HEARING SET FOR SEP-07-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $22.73 ACCRUED INTEREST, $525.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT PARRISH, MARLON H.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT PROOF OF SERVICE RECEIVED., $26.87 ACCRUED INTEREST, $618.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF MACK VENTURES, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-07-2023 IS CONTINUED FOR ORDER OF EXAMINATION TO OCT-05-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF/ JUDGMENT CREDITOR MACK VENTURE, LLC IS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY ANGELO ORCIUOL (MANAGING PARTNER). DEFENDANT/ JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARLON H. PARRISH IS PRESENT. PARTIES CONDUCTED THE EXAMINATION IN COURT HALLWAY. PARTIES RETURNED TO COURTROOM AND INFORM THEY ARE AT IMPASSE AND WANT TO SPEAK IN FRONT OF A JUDGE TO ADDRESS THE MATTER. HONORABLE JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN SUJEETH ADDRESSES THE MATTER ON THE BENCH. COURT CONTINUED ORDER OF EXAMINATION TO OCTOBER 5TH, 2023 AT 11:00 A.M. AND ORDERS JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARLON H. PARRISH TO PROVIDE HIS LAST 5 YEARS OF INCOME STATEMENT, TAX RETURN, AND BANK ACCOUNT STATEMENTS AT THE NEXT COURT DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2023 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-02-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO HEARING HELD. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR. COURT GRANTS JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARLON H. PARRISH'S TELEPHONE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE DUE TO HIS ILLNESS. ORDER OF EXAMINATION CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 2, 2023 AT 11:00 A.M. IN DEPT. 506. COURT INFORMED JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF CONTINUANCE BY TELEPHONE. PARTIES ARE TO APPEAR ON 11/2/23 AND MR. PARRISH IS TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S PRIOR 9/7/23 ORDER TO PROVIDE HIS LAST 5 YEARS OF INCOME STATEMENTS, TAX RETURNS, AND BANK ACCOUNT STATEMENTS.
ORDER TO CONTINUE ORDER OF EXAMINATION PER DEFENDANT'S TELEPHONE REQUEST DUE TO HIS ILLNESS
CORRECTED - JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED. COPY FORWARDED TO ACCOUNTING DEPT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2022 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY MACK VENTURES, LLC PARRISH, MARLON H.
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W1623B02D002, TAG # 037451 BY DEFENDANT PARRISH, MARLON H.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON PAYMENT IN FULL.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-02-2023 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT TO NOV-27-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT INFORMED THE COURT THAT HE IS GOING FORTHWITH TO ROOM 103 TO PAY OFF THE JUDGMENT ENTIRELY. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT ORDER OF EXAMINATION HEARING DATE IF PAYMENT IN FULL IS NOT MADE AT WHICH TIME THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION HEARING WILL COMMENCE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE HEARING WILL BE DISCHARGED AS SUCCESSFUL: ALL PARTIES ATTENDED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $84) SERVED MAY-28-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PARRISH, MARLON H.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF MACK VENTURES, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANGELO ORCIUOLI, MANAGER. DEFENDANT IS MARLON H. PARRISH PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
